ford_transit_custom_job_note_4624f7cf89.text: Transpondery lists Transit Custom 2012-2017 as DST80/ID63-6F. Silca independently lists Transit Custom V362/V363 2012-2016 with HU101 and 433 MHz.

ford_transit_custom_job_note_2d2f99e79d.text: Transpondery lists Transit Custom 2019+ as Hitag Pro and provides the OEM proximity references shown. Silca lists Transit Custom V362 from 2016 with HU101, 433 MHz and ID47-family remote applications.

ford_transit_custom_job_note_1c919f1d17.text: Use only where passive start is physically confirmed. OEM references and transponder family are source-backed; operation-level tool IDs remain to be mapped.

verification.notes: Duplicate wording is collapsed in this index. Each note remains traceable to the verified generation-specific records in models.json.
